allow: PowerShell($body = '{"userInput":"시계 위젯 오른쪽에 보여줘","currentLayout":{"theme":{},"widgets":[]},"mode":"edit"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:5173/api/gemini" -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host "kind: $\($r.kind\)"; if \($r.widget\) { Write-Host "widget id: $\($r.widget.id\)"; Write-Host "grid: col=$\($r.widget.grid.col\) colspan=$\($r.widget.grid.colspan\)" })

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/theme -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"prompt":"test","mode":"content","watchHistory":[{"title":"사냥개들","titleEn":"Bloodhounds","type":"tv"},{"title":"원펀맨","titleEn":"One Punch Man","type":"anime"}]}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('kind:', d.get\('kind'\)\); print\('selectedTitle:', d.get\('selectedTitle'\)\); print\('posterUrl:', d.get\('posterUrl','\(none\)'\)\); t=d.get\('theme',{}\); print\('accentColor:', t.get\('accentColor'\)\); print\('borderRadius:', t.get\('widgetBorderRadius'\)\); print\('fontStyle:', t.get\('fontStyle'\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/theme -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"prompt":"빨간색 테마 만들어줘","mode":"text"}')
